title.en: China-to-Vanuatu Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入瓦努阿图：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入萬那杜：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Vanuatu VBSI standards context, URA utility regulation, UNELCO / VUI grid-connection expectations, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface requirements, IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence, 50 Hz 230/400 V grid settings, French / IEC legacy practice, and cyclone / salt-mist coastal derating - versus China GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与瓦努阿图VBSI标准背景、URA公用事业监管、UNELCO / VUI并网预期、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公用电网接口要求、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC证据、50 Hz 230/400 V电网参数、法国/IEC传统实践及气旋/盐雾沿海降额——对比中国GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與萬那杜VBSI標準背景、URA公用事業監管、UNELCO / VUI併網預期、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用電網介面要求、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC證據、50 Hz 230/400 V電網參數、法國/IEC傳統實務及氣旋/鹽霧沿海降額——對比中國GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, VBSI standards determination, URA regulatory approval, UNELCO or VUI grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Vanuatu standards practice, URA requirements, utility connection conditions, project-owner specifications, and coastal environmental design requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、VBSI标准裁定、URA监管批准、UNELCO或VUI并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行瓦努阿图标准实践、URA要求、公用事业接入条件、项目业主规格及沿海环境设计要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、VBSI標準裁定、URA監管批准、UNELCO或VUI併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行萬那杜標準實務、URA要求、公用事業接入條件、項目業主規格及沿海環境設計要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Vanuatu, the key practical gaps are: (1) Vanuatu has limited publicly confirmed PV-inverter-specific national standards, so acceptance is usually project-, utility-, regulator-, or owner-led; (2) URA-regulated utility connection review with UNELCO in Port Vila or VUI on other concession networks must be confirmed before shipment; (3) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence should be prepared for the exact inverter model or family; (4) IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence should be prepared for grid-tied projects; (5) IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-series EMC evidence should be available; and (6) firmware and protection settings must be validated for Vanuatu's 230/400 V, 50 Hz network. Vanuatu shares China's 50 Hz frequency, but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline. Cyclone exposure, high humidity, salt-mist corrosion, thermal derating, and sea-freight routing through Port Vila should be addressed in the project technical file.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口瓦努阿图时，主要实际差距包括：（1）瓦努阿图公开确认的光伏逆变器专门国家标准有限，因此接受路径通常由项目、公用事业、监管机构或业主主导；（2）出货前须确认URA监管下的公用事业接入审查，包括维拉港UNELCO或其他特许网络的VUI；（3）应为具体逆变器型号或系列准备IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据；（4）并网项目应准备IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口证据；（5）应具备IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列EMC证据；（6）固件和保护设置须针对瓦努阿图230/400 V、50 Hz电网验证。瓦努阿图与中国同为50 Hz频率，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基准。项目技术文件还应覆盖气旋暴露、高湿、盐雾腐蚀、热降额，以及经维拉港海运的物流安排。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口萬那杜時，主要實際差距包括：（1）萬那杜公開確認的光伏逆變器專門國家標準有限，因此接受路徑通常由項目、公用事業、監管機構或業主主導；（2）出貨前須確認URA監管下的公用事業接入審查，包括維拉港UNELCO或其他特許網路的VUI；（3）應為具體逆變器型號或系列準備IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據；（4）併網項目應準備IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面證據；（5）應具備IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列EMC證據；（6）韌體和保護設置須針對萬那杜230/400 V、50 Hz電網驗證。萬那杜與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基準。項目技術文件還應覆蓋氣旋暴露、高濕、鹽霧腐蝕、熱降額，以及經維拉港海運的物流安排。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
